topics.label: Easy Interface
topics.description: curl_easy_init, curl_easy_setopt, curl_easy_perform. Simple HTTP requests.

topics.label: Headers & POST
topics.description: CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER, CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS. Send custom headers and data.

topics.label: Callbacks
topics.description: CURLOPT_WRITEFUNCTION for response data, CURLOPT_READFUNCTION for uploads.

topics.label: Multi Interface
topics.description: curl_multi for concurrent transfers without threads.
